name: Mama's Lemon Chicken (Dom Deluise Cookbook) (
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bread crumbs in a large plastic bag.
2. Add 2 tablespoons chopped parsley to the bag.
3. Dip chicken pieces in lemon juice.
4. Put chicken pieces (about 3 at a time) into the bag with bread crumbs.
5. Close the bag and turn it several times to coat the chicken pieces evenly.
6. Remove the chicken from the bag and place it in a glass baking dish coated with a thin layer of olive oil.
7. Sprinkle chopped parsley and chopped onion over the coated chicken.
8. Drizzle olive oil over the chicken pieces.
9. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about one hour.
10. Remove from oven and drizzle more lemon juice on top of chicken before serving.
